# harvester_vgpudevice (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) A unique name

### Optional

- `description` (String) Any text you want that better describes this resource
- `enabled` (Boolean) Enable vGPU for passthrough
- `labels` (Map of String)
- `node_name` (String) Name of node where parent GPU device is located
- `parent_gpu_device_address` (String) PCI bus address of parent GPU device
- `tags` (Map of String)
- `timeouts` (Block, Optional) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--timeouts))
- `vgpu_type` (String) Configured vGPU type for this vGPU device

### Read-Only

- `available_types` (Set of String) Available vGPU types for this vGPU device
- `configured_vgpu_type` (String) Current configured vGPU device type
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `message` (String)
- `state` (String)
- `status` (String) Current configuration status of vGPU device
- `uuid` (String) UUID of vGPU device

<a id="nestedblock--timeouts"></a>
### Nested Schema for `timeouts`

Optional:

- `create` (String)
- `default` (String)
- `delete` (String)
